What's going on everyone? Welcome to Alternate Double Your Challenges Play. So basically what we want to do is we don't want to forget about the things that got us here meaning organic and viral marketing, the things that we normally implement to get more out of our marketing. So here's a way to double the amount of challenges who take care of it. So 48 hours before you're weigh in, okay, so 48 hours before, so these are all people signed up, let's say they signed up for less two weeks and your weigh in is on Saturday morning, you want to text them on Thursday and say, hey, in an effort to hold everyone more accountable, make it more fun and have even higher participation in the community to the first five responders, we're going to let you split your deposit between you and a friend. So if one of you makes it, then you get half back, both make it, then you get it all back, etc. But most importantly, it's double the fun and double the weight loss. So if you're in, text me back ASAP, you know, who it's going to be and I can't wait to see you both soon. So that is the text template, feel free to edit as you desire. The concept is basically letting people bring a friend the day before or, you know, and the thing is that that's a really great offer and allows them to kind of split the risk, the rally for you is it allows you to double how much, how many supplements you sell and doubles the back end of the potential for EFT. All right. It also would essentially if someone won back $250 or $300 for the credit, then when you get to the term section where I explain how to do credit back and things like that, you would be working off of half the amount of money, which means you can give, you know, less off, etc. So hope that makes sense. The doubly challenges play. It's very straightforward. It always is useful to ask people for their spouse or coworkers or friends or anyone else who would benefit from doing this with them because we have found that people who do it with a friend are twice as likely to be successful.
